requirements.summary: Investigate and fix the loading timeout issue by improving error handling and loading state management across useQueries hooks and LoadingTimeout component usage
acceptanceCriteria: Loading states resolve properly without timeouts
Error states are properly handled and displayed to users
No infinite loading spinners occur during normal operation
Backend queries return responses within reasonable time

file_operations.description: Review and enhance all React Query hooks to ensure proper error handling with retry configuration, staleTime, and cacheTime settings. Add explicit error boundaries for failed queries. Ensure isLoading, isFetching, and error states are properly exposed and handled. Add refetchOnWindowFocus: false to prevent unnecessary refetches that could cause timeout issues.

Improve loading state management by properly handling the loading, error, and success states from useGetAllProducts query. Wrap product data fetching with LoadingTimeout component and ensure retry mechanism is properly connected. Add error boundary display for failed product fetches. Ensure the component doesn't render product-dependent UI until data is successfully loaded.

Enhance loading state handling for useGetAllProducts and useGetCallerUserRole queries. Wrap admin data fetching with LoadingTimeout component and ensure proper error display. Add combined loading state that waits for both actor initialization and data fetching. Implement retry mechanism for failed queries. Ensure access control checks don't block indefinitely on loading states.

Improve useGetProduct query error handling and loading state management. Wrap product detail fetching with LoadingTimeout component. Add proper error display for non-existent products or failed fetches. Ensure the page handles null/undefined product data gracefully without causing infinite loading.

Enhance the LoadingTimeout component to better handle edge cases. Ensure the timeout mechanism properly triggers even when queries are stuck in perpetual loading. Add logging for timeout events to help diagnose issues. Ensure the retry callback properly resets query states.

requirements.summary: Verify that all React Query hooks properly handle loading, error, and success states without causing indefinite loading conditions in ProductBrowse and AdminProducts pages
acceptanceCriteria: ProductBrowse page loads products without timeout
AdminProducts page loads admin data without timeout
Loading states transition properly to success or error states
LoadingTimeout component triggers retry mechanism when appropriate

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive query configuration to all hooks including retry: 2, retryDelay: 1000, staleTime: 30000, and refetchOnWindowFocus: false. Ensure enabled flags properly gate query execution based on actor availability. Add explicit error type handling and ensure all queries properly transition from loading to success or error states.

Implement defensive loading state checks that properly handle actor fetching state, query loading state, and error states. Ensure LoadingTimeout wraps the entire data-dependent section and passes proper retry callback that invalidates queries. Add fallback UI for error states. Verify that all product-dependent components check for data availability before rendering.

Add explicit handling for combined loading states from multiple queries (products and user role). Ensure access control checks complete before rendering admin UI. Wrap data fetching with LoadingTimeout and implement proper retry logic that re-fetches both products and role. Add error boundaries for authorization failures and query errors.

Review ProfileSetup modal display logic to ensure it doesn't interfere with page loading states. Verify that the modal only shows after actor is ready and profile query has completed (not just started). Ensure the showProfileSetup condition properly checks isFetched state to prevent premature display during loading.
